diagnosis.next_step: physically compose one selected M1x8 tile, score bank, and two-pass service cluster with activity

measurement_policy.area: replace M16x8 fabric scaling with measured M1x8 area and explicit active/area replica counts
measurement_policy.cross_stage_interface: model the same selected M1x8 drain mode for QKV, QK, and value until composed routing is measured
measurement_policy.energy: retain prior activity-backed token energy; vectorless tile power is diagnostic only
measurement_policy.precision: inherit the merged mixed-int8 Llama7B generation-quality gate
measurement_policy.schedule: recompute QKV, QK, value, subtile pipeline, layer, and token cycles from exact M1x8 service

pareto_rows.active_power_accounting_note: Instantaneous active power reports retained logic plus deployed divider instances; token energy preserves identical divider work across deployments.
remaining_abstractions: HBM energy is source-backed aggregate energy, not vendor current signoff
HBM/DRAM service latency and energy are inherited from the separated compute recost and scaled only by the score-SRAM HBM-share ratio.
NoC and SRAM energy remain profile-scaled rather than gate-level toggle power
Schedule latency is inherited from the separated compute recost and scaled only by the score-SRAM HBM-share ratio.
full QK-to-softmax-to-V RTL/perf-sim tensor-hash equivalence is pending for the separated composition
producer-to-score32 ready/valid queues and backpressure are not yet embodied in one composed RTL block
sram_macro_floorplan_pnr
operational dense-tile power is vectorless; activity-backed token energy is retained pending SAIF/VCD calibration
tile replicas, score banks, divider service, and local routing remain physically uncomposed
score-bank FakeRAM LEF/LIB views have no SRAM GDS and are not signoff
decode-shaped tile token energy is retained from prior activity evidence pending VCD/SAIF calibration
QKV and value-stage reuse of the selected M1x8 result interface is schedule-modeled pending composed routing and quantization RTL
